name: What They Built Below
description: Something was built in the sub-zero levels starting eleven months ago and finished when the Grid reactivated. Brec at the Lazarus Chamber noticed the Ministry telling him to stop filing reports — three months after the Grid event. The sub-zero program and the Lazarus Chamber may be connected.
accept_text: She doesn't ask what you're going to do with the information. This is a quality she has — she says what she knows and lets you decide what it means. 'Three months ago I noticed something,' she says. 'After you mentioned the Ministry communication telling someone to stop filing reports.' She looks at the lift. 'Three months ago, the sub-zero lift activity dropped back to baseline. Not stopped — baseline. The elevated period was exactly nine months, from nine months ago to three months ago.' She looks at you. 'Nine months of elevated activity, then baseline. Whatever they were producing — they produced enough of it, or they stopped needing the Wastes material.' She pauses. 'The sealed cases that came up at the end of the production period: I noticed they were going east through the Under-District, not into the main Hive distribution. There's a secondary transit route that goes toward the Under-District research section.' She looks at you. 'There are research facilities in the Under-District. I don't have clearance for them. I know they exist because some of my coworkers have supply rotation contracts that take them to the research section entrance.' She pauses. 'There's a monitoring facility there. Something that's been running since before my time on this tier.' She looks at the junction. 'If something was being built for the Grid down below and finished nine months ago, and the research section received deliveries from that production at the end of the nine months, and three months ago someone asked a researcher in the research section to stop filing reports —' She doesn't finish the sentence. 'You're better at finishing that kind of sentence than I am.'
complete_text: Brec reads the timeline you've written out on the paper he gave you. He reads it twice. Then he stands up very straight, which is the specific posture of someone who has been sitting with incomplete information for months and has just seen the missing pieces. 'Nine months of Wastes crystal delivery to sub-zero levels,' he says. 'Production output to the Under-District research section. Three months ago: someone told me to stop filing reports.' He looks at the monitoring station. 'Three months ago was also when I noticed something else that I hadn't connected.' He goes to the station and pulls a second folder, different from the data folder. 'Eight months ago: the simultaneous resonance shift in all subjects. Three months ago: a smaller shift, in four of the oldest subjects — the ones with complete crystal integration, no organic tissue remaining.' He opens the folder. 'The secondary shift was in the direction of — coherence. The four oldest subjects' resonance frequencies moved toward a pattern that I've been measuring for eight months and couldn't identify.' He looks at the readout. 'I can now identify it. It's the pattern of the black pre-Grid crystals. The pattern Pell described. The storage pattern.' He is very still. 'Someone delivered pre-Grid storage crystals to the sub-zero research levels, built something with them, produced output that came to the Under-District, and three months ago my subjects started resonating in the same frequency as storage media.' He meets your eyes. 'They're interfacing with whatever was built down below. The Lazarus subjects — the ones who are fully integrated — they're responding to something that is now in this building.' A long pause. 'That is not supposed to be happening. And someone who knows about the Lazarus project knew it was going to happen. That's why they told me to stop filing reports.'
